query.term.description: Free-text query across all searchable fields

fields.description: Pipe-delimited list of field names to return

pageToken.description: Opaque cursor for the next page

families.description: Search studies. Supports full Essie query language on every field. See catalog.json.metadata for the complete field tree.
Full record for one study by NCT ID.
Recursive schema tree describing every field available on a Study record.
Searchable area groups (maps labels like 'BasicSearch' to their constituent fields).
All enum types and allowed values (status codes, phases, sex, study types, etc.).
Current API version and data-load timestamp.
Size distribution statistics across all studies.

children.name: nctId
children.title: National Clinical Trial (NCT) Identification Number
children.description: The unique identification code given to each clinical study upon registration at ClinicalTrials.gov. The format is "NCT" followed by an 8-digit number. Also known as ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier
children.rules: Generated by PRS when a study is published initially

children.name: nctIdAliases
children.title: Obsolete or duplicate NCT that's associated with a published NCT
children.description: Identifier(s) that are considered "Obsolete" or "Duplicate". No study is displayed on public site. Request is redirected/forwarded to another NCT Identifier

children.name: id
children.title: Organization's Unique Protocol Identification Number
children.rules: Required for INT/OBS/EA. DP can enter "Unknown" or "TBD" and Ingest strips those value and marks them as [Missing]

children.name: type
children.title: Organization Id Type
children.description: Type of organization's unique protocol ID

children.name: link
children.title: Organization ID Link
children.description: URL link based on OrgStudyId and OrgStudyIdType input in PRS, include system-generated links to NIH RePORTER, specifically (associated with the types of federal funding identified as OrgStudyIdType)

children.name: id
children.title: Secondary ID
children.rules:
If the clinical study is funded in whole or in part by a U.S. Federal Government agency, the complete grant or contract number must be submitted as a Secondary ID.
Optional if Expanded Access Type is "Individual Patients"

children.name: type
children.title: Secondary ID Type
children.rules: Required if there is Secondary ID

children.name: domain
children.title: Secondary ID Description based on ID Type selected
children.rules: If a Secondary ID Type of "Other Grant/Funding Number," "Registry Identifier," or "Other Identifier" is selected, provide the name of the funding organization, clinical trial registry, or organization that issued the identifier.

children.name: link
children.title: Secondary ID Link
children.description: URL link based on SecondaryId and SecondaryIdType, including system-generated links to NIH RePORTER, specifically (associated with the types of federal funding identified as SecondaryIdType)

children.name: briefTitle
children.title: Brief Title
children.rules: Required for INT/OBS/EA. Has to be unique in PRS

children.name: officialTitle
children.title: Official Title
children.rules: Required for INT/OBS if Study Start Date is on or after Final Rule Effective Date (FRED). Optional for EA if EA type is "Individual Patients"

children.name: fullName
children.title: Organization Full Name
children.description: A (registered) organization (typically the Responsible Party) that sponsors the clinical  trial (study)
children.rules: Provided as part of User Information or Organization Information in a PRS Account

children.name: class
children.title: Organization type
children.description: Organization type

children.name: overallStatus
children.title: Overall Recruitment Status or Expanded Access Status
children.rules:
Required for INT/OBS/EA.
Withheld studies are a special case where a FDA-regulated device product is not yet approved or cleared by U.S. FDA (DelayedPosting). It's a system generated status.
Withheld study has the following text for Recruitment Status
This trial has been identified as being associated with a clinical device that has not been approved or cleared by the US Food and Drug Administration. Under the terms of US Public Law 110-85, Title VIII, Section 801, the details of this study are not available to the public.

children.name: lastKnownStatus
children.title: Last Known Status
children.description: A study on ClinicalTrials.gov whose last known status was recruiting; not yet recruiting; or active, not recruiting but that has passed its completion date, and the status has not been last verified within the past 2 years.
children.rules: The study's current recruitment status is "Unknown Status"

dedLink.label: Post Prior to U.S. FDA Approval or Clearance

children.name: expandedAccessInfo
children.title: Expanded Access Info
children.description: EA study info related to an INT/OBS study. Is in the Study Status module for an EA record and in the Oversight module for a study that has EA

children.name: statusForNctId
children.title: EA Recruitment Status
children.description: recruitment status of the EA study that's linked to INT/OBS

children.name: date
children.title: Study Start Date
children.rules:
Required for INT/OBS that are FRED. Day is not required in PRS when date type is Anticipated. Redacted for Withheld studies
Some EA studies have Study Start Date even though it's not mentioned in the DED and there are no FE input fields in PRS for EA (possibly switched from INT to EA at some point).

children.name: type
children.title: Study Start Date Type
children.description: Date Type
children.rules: Required for INT/OBS that are FRED. Redacted for Withheld studies

children.name: date
children.title: Primary Completion Date
children.rules:
Required for INT/OBS. However, some older INT and OBS studies do not have Primary Completion Date.
Some EA studies has Primary Completion Date/Type even though they are not in DED and there are no FE input fields in PRS
Day is not required if Date Type is Anticipated

children.name: date
children.title: Study Completion Date
children.rules: Required for INT/OBS that are FRED

children.name: studyFirstSubmitDate
children.title: Study First Submitted Date
children.description: The date on which the study sponsor or investigator first submitted a study record to ClinicalTrials.gov. There is typically a delay of a few days between the first submitted date and the record's availability on ClinicalTrials.gov (the first posted date).

children.name: studyFirstSubmitQcDate
children.title: Study First Submission Date that Met QC Criteria
children.description: The date on which the study sponsor or investigator first submits a study record that is consistent with National Library of Medicine (NLM) quality control (QC) review criteria. The sponsor or investigator may need to revise and submit a study record one or more times before NLM's QC review criteria are met. It is the responsibility of the sponsor or investigator to ensure that the study record is consistent with the NLM QC review criteria.

children.name: date
children.title: Study First Posted Date
children.description: The date on which the study record was first available on ClinicalTrials.gov after National Library of Medicine (NLM) quality control (QC) review has concluded. There is typically a delay of a few days between the date the study sponsor or investigator submitted the study record and the first posted date.

children.name: resultsFirstSubmitDate
children.title: Results First Submitted Date
children.description: The date on which the study sponsor or investigator first submits a study record with summary results information. There is typically a delay between the results first submitted date and when summary results information becomes available on ClinicalTrials.gov (the results first posted date).

children.name: resultsFirstSubmitQcDate
children.title: Results First Submitted that Met QC Criteria
children.description: The date on which the study sponsor or investigator first submits a study record with summary results information that is consistent with National Library of Medicine (NLM) quality control (QC) review criteria. The sponsor or investigator may need to revise and submit results information one or more times before NLM's QC review criteria are met. It is the responsibility of the sponsor or investigator to ensure that the study record is consistent with the NLM QC review criteria.

children.name: date
children.title: Results First Posted Date
children.description: The date on which summary results information was first available on ClinicalTrials.gov after National Library of Medicine (NLM) quality control (QC) review has concluded. There is typically a delay between the date the study sponsor or investigator first submits summary results information (the results first submitted date) and the results first posted date. Some results information may be available at an earlier date if Results First Posted with QC Comments.

children.name: type
children.title: Results First Posted Date Type
children.description: Results first posted date type. Due to historical reason, some studies have date type "Estimate"

children.name: dispFirstSubmitDate
children.title: Certification/Extension (aka Delayed Results) First Submitted Date
children.description: The date on which the study sponsor or investigator first submitted a certification or an extension request to delay submission of results. A sponsor or investigator who submits a certification can delay results submission up to 2 years after this date, unless certain events occur sooner. There is typically a delay between the date the certification or extension request was submitted and the date the information is first available on ClinicalTrials.gov (certification/extension first posted).

children.name: dispFirstSubmitQcDate
children.title: Certification/Extension First Submitted that Passed QC Review
children.description: Certification/extension first submitted that met QC criteria

children.name: date
children.title: Certification/Extension First Posted Date
children.description: The date on which information about a certification to delay submission of results or an extension request was first available on ClinicalTrials.gov. ClinicalTrials.gov does not indicate whether the submission was a certification or extension request. There is typically a delay between the date the study sponsor or investigator submitted the certification or extension request and the first posted date.

children.name: type
children.title: Certification/Extension First Posted Date Type
children.description: Due to data requirements and collections over the years, some studies might have "Estimate" dates

children.name: lastUpdateSubmitDate
children.title: Last Update Submitted Date
children.description: The most recent date on which the study sponsor or investigator submitted changes to a study record to ClinicalTrials.gov. There is typically a delay of a few days between the last update submitted date and when the date changes are posted on ClinicalTrials.gov (the last update posted date).

children.name: lastUpdatePostDateStruct
children.description: Data structure for last update posted

children.name: date
children.title: Last Update Posted Date
children.description: The most recent date on which changes to a study record were made available on ClinicalTrials.gov. There may be a delay between when the changes were submitted to ClinicalTrials.gov by the study's sponsor or investigator (the last update submitted date) and the last update posted date.

children.name: type
children.title: Last Update Posted Date Type
children.description: Due to data requirements and collections over the years, some studies might have "Estimate" dates

children.name: type
children.title: Responsible Party Type
children.rules:
Required for INT/OBS/EA for FRED.
Redacted for Withheld studies

children.name: investigatorFullName
children.title: Responsible Party Investigator Full Name
children.rules:
Required if the Responsible Party is either "Principal Investigator" or "Sponsor-Investigator".
Select from PRS user accounts associated with the organization
The Investigator Name (i.e., the Full Name from the PRS account record) must be a person's full name for display on ClinicalTrials.gov.
Redacted for Withheld studies

children.name: investigatorTitle
children.title: Responsible Party Investigator Title
children.rules:
Required if the Responsible Party is either "Principal Investigator" or "Sponsor-Investigator".
Redacted for Withheld studies

children.name: investigatorAffiliation
children.title: Responsible Party Investigator Affiliation
children.rules:
Required if the Responsible Party is either "Principal Investigator" or "Sponsor-Investigator".
Redacted for Withheld studies

children.name: oldNameTitle
children.title: Older format for Responsible Party Investigator Title

children.name: oldOrganization
children.title: Older format for Responsible Party Investigator Organization

children.name: leadSponsor
children.title: Lead Sponsor
children.description: The organization or person who initiates the study and who has authority and control over the study.
children.rules:
Required for INT/Obs/EA
[Redacted] for Withheld studies

children.name: class
children.title: Lead Sponsor Type
children.description: Sponsor organization type: Type of lead sponsor
children.rules: Required. Stored in PRS Agency Service(?) [Redacted] for Withheld studies

children.name: collaborators
children.title: Collaborator
children.description: Other organizations, if any, providing support. Support may include funding, design, implementation, data analysis or reporting.  The responsible party is responsible for confirming all collaborators before listing them

children.name: class
children.title: Collaborator Type
children.description: Type of collaborator

children.name: isFdaRegulatedDrug
children.title: Is FDA Regulated Drug
children.rules: Required for INT/FRED. Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

dedLink.label: Studies a U.S. FDA-regulated Drug Product

children.name: isFdaRegulatedDevice
children.title: Is FDA Regulated Device
children.rules: Required for INT/FRED. Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

dedLink.label: Studies a U.S. FDA-regulated Device Product

children.name: isUnapprovedDevice
children.title: Is Unapproved Device
children.rules: Required for INT/FRED. Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

dedLink.label: Device Product Not Approved or Cleared by U.S. FDA

children.name: isPpsd
children.title: Pediatric Postmarket Surveillance of a Device Product
children.rules:
Required only if this study is a pediatric postmarket surveillance of a device product ordered by the U.S. FDA.
Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

dedLink.label: Pediatric Postmarket Surveillance of a Device Product

children.name: isUsExport
children.title: Product Exported from US
children.rules:
Required if U.S. FDA-regulated Drug and/or U.S. FDA-regulated Device is "Yes," U.S. FDA IND or IDE is "No", and Facility Information does not include at least one U.S. location.
Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

dedLink.label: Product Manufactured in and Exported from the U.S.

children.name: briefSummary
children.title: Brief Summary
children.rules: Required for INT/OBS/EA. Redacted for Withheld studies

children.name: conditions
children.title: Condition/Disease
children.rules: Required for INT/OBS. Redacted for Withheld studies. Optional for EA if EA type is "individual patient"

dedLink.label: Primary Disease or Condition Being Studied in the Trial, or the Focus of the Study

children.name: studyType
children.title: Study Type
children.rules: Required. Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

children.name: nPtrsToThisExpAccNctId
children.title: Number of References to an Expanded Access Study
children.description: Number of studies that reference this EA study

children.name: expandedAccessTypes
children.title: Expanded Access Type
children.description: The type(s) of expanded access for which the investigational drug product (including a biological product) is available, as specified in U.S. FDA regulations

children.name: individual
children.title: Individual Patients
children.description: For individual participants, including for emergency use, as specified in 21 CFR 312.310. Allows a single patient, with a serious disease or condition who cannot participate in a clinical trial, access to a drug or biological product that has not been approved by the FDA. This category also includes access in an emergency situation.

children.name: intermediate
children.title: Intermediate-type Population
children.description: For intermediate-size participant populations, as specified in 21 CFR 312.315. Allows more than one patient (but generally fewer patients than through a Treatment IND/Protocol) access to a drug or biological product that has not been approved by the FDA. This type of expanded access is used when multiple patients with the same disease or condition seek access to a specific drug or biological product that has not been approved by the FDA.

children.name: treatment
children.title: Treatment IND/Protocol
children.description: Under a treatment IND or treatment protocol, as specified in 21 CFR 312.320. Allows a large, widespread population access to a drug or biological product that has not been approved by the FDA. This type of expanded access can only be provided if the product is already being developed for marketing for the same use as the expanded access use.

children.name: patientRegistry
children.title: Patient Registry
children.description: A type of observational study that collects information about patients' medical conditions and/or treatments to better understand how a condition or treatment affects patients in the real world.

children.name: targetDuration
children.title: Target Follow-Up Duration
children.rules: Required for OBS that are Patient Registry

children.name: phases
children.title: Study Phase
children.rules:
For INT studies of a drug or biologic product. Can have Missing or N/A in addition to Phases. If Missing, nothing is displayed on public site. If N/A, public site displays "Not Applicable"
N/A is recommended for trials that do not involve drug or biologic products.
Pulldown menu in PRS can have combo of 2 phases, 1&2, or 2&3.

children.name: allocation
children.title: Design Allocation
children.rules: Required for FRED (INT). Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

children.name: interventionModel
children.title: Interventional Study Design
children.rules: Required for FRED (INT). Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

children.name: primaryPurpose
children.title: Design Primary Purpose
children.rules: Required for FRED (INT). Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

children.name: observationalModel
children.title: Observational Study Model
children.rules: Required for OBS but [Missing] is allowed

children.name: timePerspective
children.title: Time Perspective
children.rules: Required for OBS but [Missing] is allowed

children.name: whoMasked
children.rules: Required for FRED (INT). Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

children.name: enrollmentInfo
children.rules: Required for OBS but [Missing] is allowed

children.name: armGroups
children.title: Arm Information
children.rules: Required for INT. Can be empty/missing but there has to be an Intervention

children.name: label
children.title: Arm Group Label
children.rules:
Required for INT. Redacted for Withheld studies
Required for OBS. Can be empty/missing if there only a single group

children.name: type
children.title: Arm Group Type
children.rules: Required for INT. Redacted for Withheld studies

children.name: description
children.title: Arm Description for INT, Group/Cohort Description for OBS
children.rules: Required for FRED. Optional for EA if EA type is "Individual Patients"

children.name: interventionNames
children.title: Arm/Group that Receives a Specific Intervention/Treatment
children.rules: If multiple Arms or Groups have been specified, indicate which Interventions (or exposures) are in each Arm or Group of the study

children.name: interventions
children.title: Intervention/Treatment
children.rules: At least one intervention must be specified for INT studies

children.name: type
children.title: Intervention/Treatment Type
children.rules: Required for INT. Optional for OBS/EA. Redacted for Withheld studies

children.name: description
children.title: Intervention Description
children.rules: Required for FRED. Optional for EA if EA type is "Individual Patients"

children.name: armGroupLabels
children.title: Arm Group Label for Intervention
children.description: Arm/Group and Intervention Cross Reference

children.name: otherNames
children.title: Other Intervention Name
children.rules: Conditionally required (if InterventionType is drug). Optional for EA if EA type is "Individual Patients"

children.name: outcomesModule
children.title: Outcome Measure Module
children.rules: For INT/OBS. There should be at least one Primary Outcome Measure

children.name: secondaryOutcomes
children.title: Secondary Outcome Measure
children.rules: Conditional if there is Secondary Outcome Measure, the following fields, title, timeframe, are required.

children.name: otherOutcomes
children.title: Other Outcome Measure
children.rules: Optional but if there is Other Outcome Measure, the following fields, title, timeframe, are required.

children.name: eligibilityCriteria
children.title: Inclusion and exclusion eligibility criteria
children.rules: Required for INT/OBS/EA. Optional if EA type is "Individual Patients"

children.name: healthyVolunteers
children.title: Accepts Healthy Volunteers
children.rules: Required for FRED, ELG NOTE and ACT

children.name: sex
children.title: Sex/Gender
children.rules:
Required for FRED, ELG NOTE and ACT. Redacted for Withheld studies
Optional for EA if EA type is "Individual Patients"

children.name: minimumAge
children.title: Minimum Age
children.rules: Required but data can be [Missing] if N/A (No limit) is selected

children.name: maximumAge
children.title: Maximum Age
children.rules: Required but data can be [Missing] if N/A (No limit) is selected

children.name: stdAges
children.title: Age Group
children.description: Ingest calculated the StdAge if there is minimumAge and/or maximimumAge entered. Redacted for Withheld studies

children.name: studyPopulation
children.title: Study Population Description
children.rules: Required for OBS only. Redacted for Withheld studies.

dedLink.label: Study Population Description (For observational studies only)

children.name: samplingMethod
children.title: Sampling Method
children.rules: Required for OBS only. Redacted for Withheld studies.

children.name: centralContacts
children.title: Central Contact Person or Optional Central Contact Backup
children.rules:
Last Name/Official Title, Phone, Email are required for Central Contact Person. Redacted for Withheld studies
Optional Central Contact Backup

dedLink.label: Central Contact Person or Optional Central Contact Backup
First Name & Middle Initial & Last Name or Official Title & Degree

children.name: role
children.title: Central Contact Role
children.description: Role for any Central Contact added

dedLink.label: First Name & Middle Initial & Last Name & Degree

children.name: role
children.title: Overall Official Role
children.rules:
Redacted for Withheld studies. PRS GUI has the following options
•[Non-Selected]
•Study Chair
•Study Director
•Study Principal Investigator

children.name: facility
children.title: Facility Name
children.rules: Required for FRED. Redacted for Withheld studies

children.name: state
children.title: State
children.rules: Required if US location. Redacted for Withheld studies

children.name: zip
children.title: Zipcode
children.rules: Required if US location. Redacted for Withheld studies

dedLink.label: Facility Contact or Facility Contact Backup
First Name & Middle Initial & Last Name & Degree

children.title: Citations to publications related to the protocol

children.title: PMID for Publication Retraction
children.description: PMID for publication retraction

children.name: label

children.rules: EA does not have this data element

children.name: url
children.rules: EA does not have this data element

children.name: availIpds
children.title: Available IPD Information
children.description: The individual participant data (IPD) sets and supporting information that are being shared for the study.
children.rules: EA does not have this data element

children.name: id
children.title: Available IPD ID
children.rules: EA does not have this data element. Types are stored as character strings, including user-specified other type (max 254 characters)

children.name: type
children.title: Available IPD Type
children.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

children.name: url
children.title: Available IPD URL
children.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

children.name: comment
children.title: Available IPD Comment
children.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

children.title: IPDSharing Statement Module
children.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

children.name: ipdSharing
children.title: Plan to Share IPD
children.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

children.name: description
children.title: IPD Sharing Description
children.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

children.name: timeFrame
children.title: IPDSharing Time Frame
children.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

children.name: accessCriteria
children.title: IPDSharing Access Criteria
children.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

children.name: id
children.title: Arm/Group ID
children.description: Arm/Group ID generated by PRS

children.name: title
children.title: Arm/Group Title
children.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

children.name: achievements
children.title: Milestone Data
children.description: Milestone Data (per arm/group)

children.name: groupId
children.title: Milestone Arm/Group ID
children.description: ID

children.name: comment
children.title: Description of Reason Not Completed
children.description: A brief description of the reason for non-completion, if "Other" Reason Not Completed Type is selected.

children.name: reasons
children.description: Reason for Not Completed per arm/group

children.name: groupId
children.title: Reason Group ID
children.description: Internally generated ID for reason not completed per arm/group

children.name: id
children.title: Arm/Group ID
children.description: Internally generated ID

children.name: title
children.title: Arm/Group Title
children.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

children.name: denoms
children.description: Structure for Overall Baseline Measure Data (Row)

children.name: counts
children.description: Structure for overall number per arm/group

children.name: groupId
children.title: Arm/Group ID
children.description: Internally generated ID for each Arm/Group

children.name: description
children.title: Baseline Measure Title for Study-Specified Measure

children.name: calculatePct
children.title: Calculated Percentage
children.description: percentage of BaselineMeasurementValue/BaselineMeasureDenomCountValue

children.name: counts
children.description: number entered for unit of measure

children.name: groupId
children.description: Internally generated ID for each Arm/Group

children.name: classes
children.description: Structure for a Baseline Measure ROW
children.rules: Required if there is more than one row category

children.name: units
children.title: Baseline Row Unit of Measure
children.description: Possible analysis population when data are presented in rows (e.g., if units other than participants are included in baseline, both participants and the units are listed as BaselineClassDenomUnits for the applicable baseline measure)

children.name: counts
children.title: Number of Baseline Row Participants
children.description: Population Analyzed for a Row

children.name: groupId
children.description: Internal ID per Arm/Group for a Baseline Measure

children.name: value
children.description: Data per Arm/Group per Baseline Measure per Row

children.name: categories
children.description: Categories under a Baseline Measure (represented as rows in data table)

children.name: measurements
children.description: Data structure per Arm/Group per Category

children.name: groupId
children.title: Arm/Group ID
children.description: Internal ID per Arm/Group per Category

children.name: spread
children.title: data
children.description: Data per Arm/Group per Category. Based on Measure Type and Measure of Dispersion (e.g., Standard Deviation)

children.name: lowerLimit
children.title: data
children.description: Data per Arm/Group per Category. Based on Measure Type and Measure of Dispersion (e.g., lower limit of Full Range)

children.name: upperLimit
children.title: data
children.description: Data per Arm/Group per Category. Based on Measure Type and Measure of Dispersion (e.g., upper limit of Full Range)

children.name: comment
children.title: Comments for N/A values
children.description: Explain why baseline measure data are not available, if "NA" is reported for Baseline Measure Data.

children.name: reportingStatus
children.title: Reporting Status
children.description: Whether there is Outcome Measure Data reported

children.name: calculatePct
children.title: Calculated Percentage
children.description: percentage of OutcomeMeasurementValue/OutcomeMeasureDenomCountValue (internally calculated)

children.name: denomUnitsSelected
children.description: OutcomeMeasureTypeUnitsAnalyzed

children.name: analyses
children.title: Outcome Measure Analysis
children.description:
Result(s) of scientifically appropriate tests of statistical significance of the primary and secondary outcome measures, if any. Such analyses include: pre-specified in the protocol and/or statistical analysis plan; made public by the sponsor or responsible party; conducted on a primary outcome measure in response to a request made by FDA.
If a statistical analysis is reported "Comparison Group Selection" and "Type of Statistical Test" are required. In addition, one of the following data elements are required with the associated information: "P-Value," "Estimation Parameter," or "Other Statistical Analysis."

children.name: ciNumSides
children.title: Number of Sides for Confidence Interval

children.name: ciLowerLimitComment
children.title: Lower Limit Comment
children.description: Confidence Interval - lower limit comment

children.name: ciUpperLimitComment
children.title: Upper Limit Comment
children.description: Confidence Interval - upper limit comment (Explain why the upper limit data are not available, if "NA" is reported as upper-limit of "2-sided" confidence interval.)

children.name: frequencyThreshold
children.title: Frequency Threshold
children.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

dedLink.label: Frequency Threshold for Reporting Other (Not Including Serious) Adverse Events

children.name: id
children.title: Arm/Group ID
children.description: Internal group id

children.name: title
children.title: Arm/Group Title
children.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

children.name: description
children.title: Arm/Group Description
children.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

children.name: deathsNumAffected
children.title: Total Number Affected by All-Cause Mortality
children.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

dedLink.label: Total Number Affected by All-Cause Mortality

children.name: deathsNumAtRisk
children.title: Total Number at Risk for All-Cause Mortality

dedLink.label: Total Number at Risk for All-Cause Mortality

children.name: seriousNumAffected
children.title: Number Affected by a Serious Adverse Event

dedLink.label: Total Number Affected by Any Serious Adverse Event

children.name: seriousNumAtRisk
children.title: Number at Risk for a Serious Adverse Event

children.name: seriousEvents
children.title: Serious Adverse Event
children.description: A table of all anticipated and unanticipated serious adverse events, grouped by organ system, with the number and frequency of such events by arm or comparison group of the clinical study.

children.name: sourceVocabulary
children.title: Source Vocabulary Name for Serious Adverse Event
children.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

children.name: assessmentType
children.title: Collection Approach (or Collection Approach for Table Default required)

children.name: notes
children.title: Serious Adverse Event Term Additional Description

children.name: stats
children.title: Statistical information
children.description: Statistical information for each Serious Adverse Event

children.name: groupId
children.title: Group ID
children.description: Internal Arm/Group ID

children.name: numEvents
children.title: Number of Serious Events in an Arm/Group

children.name: otherEvents
children.title: Other Adverse Events
children.description: Other (Not Including Serious) Adverse Events - similar to Serious AE

children.name: piSponsorEmployee
children.title: Agreement PI Sponsor Employee
children.rules: If PIs are not NOT employees, and there are restrictions, the types of restriction (GT60 is greater than 60, less than or equal to 180 days; LTE is less than or equal to 60 days) - Other requires a free text explanation

dedLink.label: Are all PIs Employees of Sponsor?

children.name: organization
children.title: Point of Contact Organization
children.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

children.name: email
children.title: Point of Contact Email
children.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

children.name: unpostedAnnotation
children.title: Unposted Annotation
children.description: Tracking information for study results submission/QA review process (Results Submitted but not yet Published)

children.name: unpostedResponsibleParty
children.title: Responsible Party for Unposted Events
children.description: Information provider (Responsible Party)

children.name: unpostedEvents
children.title: Unposted Event
children.description: A Results Release, UnRelease or Reset event

children.name: type
children.title: Study Results Submission Type
children.description: Study Results Submission Type

children.name: date
children.title: Study Results Submission Date
children.description: Study Results Submission Date

children.name: violationAnnotation
children.title: FDAAA 801 Violations
children.description: FDAAA 801 Violations - entered by PRS admins

children.name: violationEvents
children.title: Violation Event
children.description: PRS admin can enter one of the following types and descriptions, or other text

children.name: type
children.title: Violation Event Type
children.description:
•	Violation Identified by FDA
•	Correction Confirmed by FDA
•	Penalty Imposed by FDA

children.name: description
children.title: Violation Event Type Description
children.description:
•	Failure to Submit. The entry for this clinical trial was not complete at the time of submission, as required by law. This may or may not have any bearing on the accuracy of the information in the entry.
•	Submission of False Information. The entry for this clinical trial was found to be false or misleading and therefore not in compliance with the law.
•	Non-submission. The entry for this clinical trial did not contain information on the primary and secondary outcomes at the time of submission, as required by law. This may or may not have any bearing on the accuracy of the information in the entry.
•	The responsible party has corrected the violation.
•	A $XX,XXX penalty was imposed against the responsible party for the violation.

children.name: creationDate
children.title: Violation Event Creation Date
children.description: Date the violation entered in PRS

children.name: issuedDate
children.title: Violation Event Issued Date
children.description: Date the FDA issued the violation

children.name: releaseDate
children.title: Violation Event Released Date
children.description: Date the study record was submitted

children.name: postedDate
children.title: Violation Event Posted Date
children.description: Date the violation is available on clinicaltrials.gov

children.name: noSap
children.title: Document Has No Statistical Analysis Plan (SAP)
children.description: Indicate that No Statistical Analysis Plan (SAP) exists for this study.

children.name: largeDocs
children.title: Uploaded Document Information
children.description: PDF/A document by data provider

children.name: hasProtocol
children.title: Document Includes Study Protocol
children.description: Indicate if document includes Study Protocol (Yes/No)

children.name: hasSap
children.title: Document Includes Statistical Analysis Plan (SAP)
children.description: Indicate is document includes Statistical Analysis Plan (Yes/No)

children.name: hasIcf
children.title: Document Includes Informed Consent Form (ICF)
children.description: Indicate if document includes Informed Consent Form (Yes/No)

children.name: uploadDate
children.title: Document Uploaded Date
children.description: Date the document was uploaded to PRS

children.name: filename
children.title: Document File Name
children.description: Document file name (by data provider)

children.name: size
children.title: Document File Size
children.description: Document file size

children.name: versionHolder
children.title: Version Holder
children.description: The most recent date where Ingest ran successfully

children.name: removedCountries
children.title: Removed Countries
children.description: Country for which all locations have been removed from the study

children.name: submissionTracking
children.title: Submission Tracking
children.description: Results submission tracking

children.name: estimatedResultsFirstSubmitDate
children.title: Estimated Results First Submitted Date
children.description: Results First Submitted Date but not yet Posted (e.g., still under QC review). ResultsFirstSubmitDate at this point is kept empty until Results is published on the public site

children.name: date
children.title: First MCP Posted Date
children.description: Date of first MCP posted date

children.name: type
children.title: First MCP Posted Date Type
children.description: Date type for first MCP posted date

children.name: submissionInfos
children.title: Study Results Submission Info
children.description: Results submission cycle information of a study

children.name: releaseDate
children.title: Release Date
children.description: Results released by DP to NLM

children.name: unreleaseDate
children.title: Unrelease Date
children.description: Results unrelease (canceled release) by DP

children.name: resetDate
children.title: Reset Date
children.description: NLM QC reviewer reset/unlock study back to DP

children.name: mcpReleaseN
children.title: Number of MCPs
children.description: Number of Major Comment Postings of a study

metadata_tree.name: hasResults
metadata_tree.title: Has Results
metadata_tree.description: Flag that indicates if a study has posted results on public site

fields_flat.name: nctId
fields_flat.title: National Clinical Trial (NCT) Identification Number
fields_flat.rules: Generated by PRS when a study is published initially

fields_flat.name: nctIdAliases
fields_flat.title: Obsolete or duplicate NCT that's associated with a published NCT

fields_flat.name: id
fields_flat.title: Organization's Unique Protocol Identification Number
fields_flat.rules: Required for INT/OBS/EA. DP can enter "Unknown" or "TBD" and Ingest strips those value and marks them as [Missing]

fields_flat.name: id
fields_flat.title: Secondary ID
fields_flat.rules:
If the clinical study is funded in whole or in part by a U.S. Federal Government agency, the complete grant or contract number must be submitted as a Secondary ID.
Optional if Expanded Access Type is "Individual Patients"

fields_flat.name: type
fields_flat.title: Secondary ID Type
fields_flat.rules: Required if there is Secondary ID

fields_flat.name: domain
fields_flat.title: Secondary ID Description based on ID Type selected
fields_flat.rules: If a Secondary ID Type of "Other Grant/Funding Number," "Registry Identifier," or "Other Identifier" is selected, provide the name of the funding organization, clinical trial registry, or organization that issued the identifier.

fields_flat.name: briefTitle
fields_flat.title: Brief Title
fields_flat.rules: Required for INT/OBS/EA. Has to be unique in PRS

fields_flat.name: officialTitle
fields_flat.title: Official Title
fields_flat.rules: Required for INT/OBS if Study Start Date is on or after Final Rule Effective Date (FRED). Optional for EA if EA type is "Individual Patients"

fields_flat.name: fullName
fields_flat.title: Organization Full Name
fields_flat.rules: Provided as part of User Information or Organization Information in a PRS Account

fields_flat.name: overallStatus
fields_flat.title: Overall Recruitment Status or Expanded Access Status
fields_flat.rules:
Required for INT/OBS/EA.
Withheld studies are a special case where a FDA-regulated device product is not yet approved or cleared by U.S. FDA (DelayedPosting). It's a system generated status.
Withheld study has the following text for Recruitment Status
This trial has been identified as being associated with a clinical device that has not been approved or cleared by the US Food and Drug Administration. Under the terms of US Public Law 110-85, Title VIII, Section 801, the details of this study are not available to the public.

fields_flat.name: lastKnownStatus
fields_flat.title: Last Known Status
fields_flat.rules: The study's current recruitment status is "Unknown Status"

dedLink.label: Post Prior to U.S. FDA Approval or Clearance

fields_flat.name: date
fields_flat.title: Study Start Date
fields_flat.rules:
Required for INT/OBS that are FRED. Day is not required in PRS when date type is Anticipated. Redacted for Withheld studies
Some EA studies have Study Start Date even though it's not mentioned in the DED and there are no FE input fields in PRS for EA (possibly switched from INT to EA at some point).

fields_flat.name: type
fields_flat.title: Study Start Date Type
fields_flat.rules: Required for INT/OBS that are FRED. Redacted for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: date
fields_flat.title: Primary Completion Date
fields_flat.rules:
Required for INT/OBS. However, some older INT and OBS studies do not have Primary Completion Date.
Some EA studies has Primary Completion Date/Type even though they are not in DED and there are no FE input fields in PRS
Day is not required if Date Type is Anticipated

fields_flat.name: date
fields_flat.title: Study Completion Date
fields_flat.rules: Required for INT/OBS that are FRED

fields_flat.name: studyFirstSubmitQcDate
fields_flat.title: Study First Submission Date that Met QC Criteria

fields_flat.name: resultsFirstSubmitQcDate
fields_flat.title: Results First Submitted that Met QC Criteria

fields_flat.name: dispFirstSubmitDate
fields_flat.title: Certification/Extension (aka Delayed Results) First Submitted Date

fields_flat.name: dispFirstSubmitQcDate
fields_flat.title: Certification/Extension First Submitted that Passed QC Review

fields_flat.name: type
fields_flat.title: Responsible Party Type
fields_flat.rules:
Required for INT/OBS/EA for FRED.
Redacted for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: investigatorFullName
fields_flat.title: Responsible Party Investigator Full Name
fields_flat.rules:
Required if the Responsible Party is either "Principal Investigator" or "Sponsor-Investigator".
Select from PRS user accounts associated with the organization
The Investigator Name (i.e., the Full Name from the PRS account record) must be a person's full name for display on ClinicalTrials.gov.
Redacted for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: investigatorTitle
fields_flat.title: Responsible Party Investigator Title
fields_flat.rules:
Required if the Responsible Party is either "Principal Investigator" or "Sponsor-Investigator".
Redacted for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: investigatorAffiliation
fields_flat.title: Responsible Party Investigator Affiliation
fields_flat.rules:
Required if the Responsible Party is either "Principal Investigator" or "Sponsor-Investigator".
Redacted for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: oldNameTitle
fields_flat.title: Older format for Responsible Party Investigator Title

fields_flat.name: oldOrganization
fields_flat.title: Older format for Responsible Party Investigator Organization

fields_flat.name: leadSponsor
fields_flat.title: Lead Sponsor
fields_flat.rules:
Required for INT/Obs/EA
[Redacted] for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: class
fields_flat.title: Lead Sponsor Type
fields_flat.rules: Required. Stored in PRS Agency Service(?) [Redacted] for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: isFdaRegulatedDrug
fields_flat.title: Is FDA Regulated Drug

dedLink.label: Studies a U.S. FDA-regulated Drug Product

fields_flat.rules: Required for INT/FRED. Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: isFdaRegulatedDevice
fields_flat.title: Is FDA Regulated Device

dedLink.label: Studies a U.S. FDA-regulated Device Product

fields_flat.rules: Required for INT/FRED. Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: isUnapprovedDevice
fields_flat.title: Is Unapproved Device

dedLink.label: Device Product Not Approved or Cleared by U.S. FDA

fields_flat.rules: Required for INT/FRED. Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: isPpsd
fields_flat.title: Pediatric Postmarket Surveillance of a Device Product

dedLink.label: Pediatric Postmarket Surveillance of a Device Product

fields_flat.rules:
Required only if this study is a pediatric postmarket surveillance of a device product ordered by the U.S. FDA.
Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: isUsExport
fields_flat.title: Product Exported from US

dedLink.label: Product Manufactured in and Exported from the U.S.

fields_flat.rules:
Required if U.S. FDA-regulated Drug and/or U.S. FDA-regulated Device is "Yes," U.S. FDA IND or IDE is "No", and Facility Information does not include at least one U.S. location.
Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: briefSummary
fields_flat.title: Brief Summary
fields_flat.rules: Required for INT/OBS/EA. Redacted for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: conditions
fields_flat.title: Condition/Disease

dedLink.label: Primary Disease or Condition Being Studied in the Trial, or the Focus of the Study

fields_flat.rules: Required for INT/OBS. Redacted for Withheld studies. Optional for EA if EA type is "individual patient"

fields_flat.name: studyType
fields_flat.title: Study Type
fields_flat.rules: Required. Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: nPtrsToThisExpAccNctId
fields_flat.title: Number of References to an Expanded Access Study

fields_flat.name: targetDuration
fields_flat.title: Target Follow-Up Duration
fields_flat.rules: Required for OBS that are Patient Registry

fields_flat.name: phases
fields_flat.title: Study Phase
fields_flat.rules:
For INT studies of a drug or biologic product. Can have Missing or N/A in addition to Phases. If Missing, nothing is displayed on public site. If N/A, public site displays "Not Applicable"
N/A is recommended for trials that do not involve drug or biologic products.
Pulldown menu in PRS can have combo of 2 phases, 1&2, or 2&3.

fields_flat.name: allocation
fields_flat.title: Design Allocation
fields_flat.rules: Required for FRED (INT). Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: interventionModel
fields_flat.title: Interventional Study Design
fields_flat.rules: Required for FRED (INT). Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: primaryPurpose
fields_flat.title: Design Primary Purpose
fields_flat.rules: Required for FRED (INT). Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: observationalModel
fields_flat.title: Observational Study Model
fields_flat.rules: Required for OBS but [Missing] is allowed

fields_flat.name: timePerspective
fields_flat.title: Time Perspective
fields_flat.rules: Required for OBS but [Missing] is allowed

fields_flat.name: whoMasked
fields_flat.rules: Required for FRED (INT). Marked as [Missing] for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: enrollmentInfo
fields_flat.rules: Required for OBS but [Missing] is allowed

fields_flat.name: armGroups
fields_flat.title: Arm Information
fields_flat.rules: Required for INT. Can be empty/missing but there has to be an Intervention

fields_flat.name: label
fields_flat.title: Arm Group Label
fields_flat.rules:
Required for INT. Redacted for Withheld studies
Required for OBS. Can be empty/missing if there only a single group

fields_flat.name: type
fields_flat.title: Arm Group Type
fields_flat.rules: Required for INT. Redacted for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: description
fields_flat.title: Arm Description for INT, Group/Cohort Description for OBS
fields_flat.rules: Required for FRED. Optional for EA if EA type is "Individual Patients"

fields_flat.name: interventionNames
fields_flat.title: Arm/Group that Receives a Specific Intervention/Treatment
fields_flat.rules: If multiple Arms or Groups have been specified, indicate which Interventions (or exposures) are in each Arm or Group of the study

fields_flat.name: interventions
fields_flat.title: Intervention/Treatment
fields_flat.rules: At least one intervention must be specified for INT studies

fields_flat.name: type
fields_flat.title: Intervention/Treatment Type
fields_flat.rules: Required for INT. Optional for OBS/EA. Redacted for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: description
fields_flat.title: Intervention Description
fields_flat.rules: Required for FRED. Optional for EA if EA type is "Individual Patients"

fields_flat.name: otherNames
fields_flat.title: Other Intervention Name
fields_flat.rules: Conditionally required (if InterventionType is drug). Optional for EA if EA type is "Individual Patients"

fields_flat.name: outcomesModule
fields_flat.title: Outcome Measure Module
fields_flat.rules: For INT/OBS. There should be at least one Primary Outcome Measure

fields_flat.name: secondaryOutcomes
fields_flat.title: Secondary Outcome Measure
fields_flat.rules: Conditional if there is Secondary Outcome Measure, the following fields, title, timeframe, are required.

fields_flat.name: otherOutcomes
fields_flat.title: Other Outcome Measure
fields_flat.rules: Optional but if there is Other Outcome Measure, the following fields, title, timeframe, are required.

fields_flat.name: eligibilityCriteria
fields_flat.title: Inclusion and exclusion eligibility criteria
fields_flat.rules: Required for INT/OBS/EA. Optional if EA type is "Individual Patients"

fields_flat.name: healthyVolunteers
fields_flat.title: Accepts Healthy Volunteers
fields_flat.rules: Required for FRED, ELG NOTE and ACT

fields_flat.name: sex
fields_flat.title: Sex/Gender
fields_flat.rules:
Required for FRED, ELG NOTE and ACT. Redacted for Withheld studies
Optional for EA if EA type is "Individual Patients"

fields_flat.name: minimumAge
fields_flat.title: Minimum Age
fields_flat.rules: Required but data can be [Missing] if N/A (No limit) is selected

fields_flat.name: maximumAge
fields_flat.title: Maximum Age
fields_flat.rules: Required but data can be [Missing] if N/A (No limit) is selected

fields_flat.name: studyPopulation
fields_flat.title: Study Population Description

dedLink.label: Study Population Description (For observational studies only)

fields_flat.rules: Required for OBS only. Redacted for Withheld studies.

fields_flat.name: samplingMethod
fields_flat.title: Sampling Method
fields_flat.rules: Required for OBS only. Redacted for Withheld studies.

fields_flat.name: centralContacts
fields_flat.title: Central Contact Person or Optional Central Contact Backup

dedLink.label: Central Contact Person or Optional Central Contact Backup

fields_flat.rules:
Last Name/Official Title, Phone, Email are required for Central Contact Person. Redacted for Withheld studies
Optional Central Contact Backup

dedLink.label: First Name & Middle Initial & Last Name or Official Title & Degree
First Name & Middle Initial & Last Name & Degree

fields_flat.name: role
fields_flat.title: Overall Official Role
fields_flat.rules:
Redacted for Withheld studies. PRS GUI has the following options
•[Non-Selected]
•Study Chair
•Study Director
•Study Principal Investigator

fields_flat.name: facility
fields_flat.title: Facility Name
fields_flat.rules: Required for FRED. Redacted for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: state
fields_flat.title: State
fields_flat.rules: Required if US location. Redacted for Withheld studies

fields_flat.name: zip
fields_flat.title: Zipcode
fields_flat.rules: Required if US location. Redacted for Withheld studies

dedLink.label: Facility Contact or Facility Contact Backup
First Name & Middle Initial & Last Name & Degree

fields_flat.title: Citations to publications related to the protocol

fields_flat.title: See Also Link Label Title
fields_flat.rules: EA does not have this data element

fields_flat.name: url
fields_flat.rules: EA does not have this data element

fields_flat.name: availIpds
fields_flat.title: Available IPD Information
fields_flat.rules: EA does not have this data element

fields_flat.name: id
fields_flat.title: Available IPD ID
fields_flat.rules: EA does not have this data element. Types are stored as character strings, including user-specified other type (max 254 characters)

fields_flat.name: type
fields_flat.title: Available IPD Type
fields_flat.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

fields_flat.name: url
fields_flat.title: Available IPD URL
fields_flat.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

fields_flat.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

fields_flat.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

fields_flat.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

fields_flat.name: description
fields_flat.title: IPD Sharing Description
fields_flat.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

fields_flat.title: IPDSharing Time Frame
fields_flat.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

fields_flat.name: accessCriteria
fields_flat.title: IPDSharing Access Criteria
fields_flat.rules: For INT/OBS. EA does not have this data element

fields_flat.name: title
fields_flat.title: Arm/Group Title
fields_flat.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

fields_flat.name: title
fields_flat.title: Arm/Group Title
fields_flat.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

fields_flat.name: description
fields_flat.title: Baseline Measure Title for Study-Specified Measure

fields_flat.name: classes
fields_flat.rules: Required if there is more than one row category

fields_flat.name: ciNumSides
fields_flat.title: Number of Sides for Confidence Interval

fields_flat.name: frequencyThreshold
fields_flat.title: Frequency Threshold

dedLink.label: Frequency Threshold for Reporting Other (Not Including Serious) Adverse Events

fields_flat.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

fields_flat.name: title
fields_flat.title: Arm/Group Title
fields_flat.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

fields_flat.name: description
fields_flat.title: Arm/Group Description
fields_flat.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

fields_flat.name: deathsNumAffected
fields_flat.title: Total Number Affected by All-Cause Mortality

dedLink.label: Total Number Affected by All-Cause Mortality

fields_flat.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

fields_flat.name: deathsNumAtRisk
fields_flat.title: Total Number at Risk for All-Cause Mortality

dedLink.label: Total Number at Risk for All-Cause Mortality

fields_flat.name: seriousNumAffected
fields_flat.title: Number Affected by a Serious Adverse Event

fields_flat.name: sourceVocabulary
fields_flat.title: Source Vocabulary Name for Serious Adverse Event
fields_flat.rules: Required if Primary Completion Date is on or after January 18, 2017

fields_flat.name: assessmentType
fields_flat.title: Collection Approach (or Collection Approach for Table Default required)

fields_flat.name: notes
fields_flat.title: Serious Adverse Event Term Additional Description

values.legacyValue: Issues in letter addressed; confirmed by FDA.
